title: Jira Cloud integration not working
excerpt: I have the new Jira integration set up to sync one-way from Jira to Mondasy.  However, it does not consistently sync.   it only syncs a few Jira issues randomly – typically about 20%of the issues that should be syncing. …

posts.author: mcouger (Mechele Couger)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the new Jira integration set up to sync one-way from Jira to Mondasy. However, it does not consistently sync. it only syncs a few Jira issues randomly – typically about 20%of the issues that should be syncing. I understand it does not sync retroactively, but it currently isn’t even consistently syncing when an issue is created in Jira.
